name: Ginwa Enterprise (Group) Inc.
summary: Ginwa Enterprise (Group) Inc. researches, develops, produces, and sells proprietary Chinese, biological, and chemical medicines in China. It offers orthopedic, immune, pediatric, antibiotic, digestive system, gynecological, cardiovascular, antipyretic, analgesic, antiviral, and other products. The company provides its products in the form of capsules, powders, and tablets. Ginwa Enterprise (Group) Inc. is based in Xi'an, China.
